title: dianthus strictiformis
intro: Dianthus strictiformis, also known as the strict-flowered pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Dianthus strictiformis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk remedies and skincare products.
